description: Authoritative exact-claim ledger for WM-owned custom IDs plus coarse spell namespace subranges.
notes: This file is the exact-claim authority for custom IDs already used by WM.
Exact duplicate ids are forbidden only within the same namespace.
reserved_id_ranges.json remains coarse allocator policy only; do not use it as the exact-claim ledger.

ranges.purpose: Pinned compatibility space for current named WM spell shells and legacy shell-bank ids.
ranges.allocation_rule: Do not allocate managed spell slots from this range; only claim explicit named shell ids here.

ranges.purpose: Generic cast-shape shell-bank V2 space for client-prepatched WM spell shells.
ranges.allocation_rule: Use for generic client-visible cast shapes only; keep behavior generic and bind bespoke logic server-side.

ranges.purpose: Managed spell publish and rollback slots used by wm.spells.publish and workbench-generated spell drafts.
ranges.allocation_rule: Allocate through wm_reserved_slot entity type `spell`; never reuse named shell ids from the shell-bank ranges.

ranges.purpose: Managed WM quest slots, including repeatable bounties and test quests.
Managed WM item slots for generated rewards and equipped artifacts.
WM-authored conversation menus and branching nodes.
ranges.allocation_rule: Reserve for future WM gossip work; current repo usage is limited.
Reserve for future WM dialogue work; current repo usage is limited.

claims.purpose: Pinned WM compatibility summon shell for Bonebound Servant experiments.
notes: Keep pinned for compatibility; do not reuse as a managed spell slot.

claims.purpose: Pinned WM compatibility summon shell for the current Bonebound Alpha release lane.
notes: Legacy key retained for operator compatibility; this shell now maps to summon_bonebound_alpha_v3.

claims.purpose: Pinned WM compatibility passive shell for intellect/spellpower to block-rating behavior.
Named WM self-cast shell for storing active Echo Destroyer/Echo Restorer counts and restoring them later from Bonebound Alpha.
notes: Stores only role counts, not live creature GUIDs, health, power, or remaining timers.
Uses Soul Shard reagent cost through shell DBC presentation and restores echoes with fresh runtime stats and max timer.

claims.purpose: Pinned WM compatibility pet-active shell reserved for Bonebound pet action work.
notes: Reserved but not promoted as a stable live operator lane.

claims.purpose: Bundled managed spell-slot example for publish and rollback documentation/tests.
Phase 1 reactive bounty benchmark quest used for native parity proofs.
Control-native convergence proof quest used for audit and fresh source-event grant validation.
Managed bounty reward proof quest for Night Watcher's Lens.
Managed WM reward item with visible wearer marker and tracked target debuff behavior.
Consumable item that opens a server-side menu to apply up to three unstable random enchants to an eligible equipped item.
notes: Server-owned item-use path; no per-iteration client patch. Right-click uses a known item spell only to make the item client-usable, then native ItemScript cancels default casting and owns the target menu/effect.
BridgeLab proof on 2026-04-25 for player 5406 confirmed direct native grant, right-click item menu, random enchant application, and vellum consumption.
Scoped kill-roll proof on 2026-04-25 used event 3576 and native player_add_item request 161, which reached done for item 910007 x1.
Scoped watcher proof on 2026-04-25 used a short 100% BridgeLab proof window after arming from end; fresh kill events 3578 and 3579 submitted requests 162 and 163, both done for item 910007 x1.
Repo retune raises normal drop chance to 7%, stack size to 999, and gives item-use rolls a 10% chance to use tier 5.

BridgeLab SQL apply, native rebuild/restart, and direct native grant proof passed on 2026-04-25: debug_ping request 164, player_add_item request 165 for item 910007, and worldserver pid 33620. In-game retuned item-use proof is still pending.

claims.purpose: Focused consumable item that opens a server-side menu to choose an eligible equipped item and reroll exactly one selected enchant slot with weighted tier chances: 40% tier 3, 30% tier 4, 30% tier 5.
notes: Server-owned item-use path; no per-iteration client patch.
Repo implementation grants this focused vellum from scoped kill rolls at 3.5% when random-enchant-on-kill is enabled.

The item stacks to 999, consumes one vellum only after an enchant result, lets the player choose the target item and one enchant slot, and rolls weighted tiers at 40% tier 3, 30% tier 4, and 30% tier 5.
BridgeLab SQL apply, native rebuild/restart, and direct native grant proof passed on 2026-04-25: debug_ping request 164, player_add_item request 166 for item 910008, and worldserver pid 33620.

Weighted tier retune was rebuilt/restarted on 2026-04-25 to worldserver pid 31360; debug_ping request 260 reached done, while extra grant request 261 failed because player 5406 was offline. In-game focused menu/slot-reroll proof is still pending.

claims.purpose: Consumable throwable that deploys a server-owned Bone Lure Obelisk to pulse-taunt eligible non-boss enemies.
notes: Server-owned item-use path; no per-iteration client patch. The item uses a known bomb spell only to provide ground-target client UX, then native ItemScript cancels stock bomb behavior.
Deploys creature template 920102 for 30 seconds.
BridgeLab proof on 2026-04-25 confirmed SQL apply, native rebuild/restart, scoped debug_ping request 262, scoped player_add_item request 263, and character DB inventory count 5 for player 5406.
In-game throw and taunt behavior proof is still pending.

claims.purpose: WM creature template used by Bonebound Alpha so stock Summon Voidwalker can remain separate.
WM creature template used by melee Bonebound Echo Destroyer summons.
Rare support-role Echo Restorer variant that heals, shields, regenerates, dispels, and contributes visible shadow spell damage for Bonebound Alpha/Echo play.
notes: Spawned from the same Alpha melee trigger lane as Echo Destroyers, with its own 5% support-role proc chance.
Uses Skeletal Magelord creature display 11397 from stock NPC 15121 and randomly chooses a level-appropriate rare/epic staff item entry from the configured staff model pool.

Repo implementation is native/config WORKING after tests; live gameplay proof remains PARTIAL until BridgeLab confirms healing, shielding, regeneration, dispels, and visible Mind Blast filler casts in combat.

claims.purpose: Attackable WM lure structure spawned by item 910009; it has owner-scaled health, 75% damage reduction, DoT/status immunity, and continuous non-boss taunt pulses.
notes: Cloned from Stoneclaw Totem for attackable structure behavior and shown with a Necrotic Shard-style model.
Native runtime skips bosses, dungeon bosses, no-taunt creatures, player-owned pets/totems, triggers, and civilians.
BridgeLab build and DB apply are proven; in-game spawn/taunt/duration proof is still pending.

claims.purpose: WM DBC override row that makes Dual Wield skill 118 login-valid before explicit grant handling.
WM DBC override row that makes Leather skill 414 login-valid before explicit grant handling.
WM DBC override row that makes Shield skill 433 login-valid before explicit grant handling.
WM DBC override row that binds stock passive 9077 to Leather skill 414.
WM DBC override row that binds stock passive 9116 to Shield skill 433.
WM DBC override row that binds stock passive 107 to Shield skill 433 for client visibility.
